title: Sebola out as Knysna Municipal Manager
description: KNYSNA NEWS - A decision taken more than a...
bodyText:
Breaking News

KNYSNA NEWS - A decision taken more than a year ago on 25 January 2023 to appoint Phineas Ombali Sebola as Municipal Manager (MM) of Knysna has been set aside by the Western Cape High Court.


> In a judgment delivered today, Friday 10 May, Judge M Pangarkar declared Sebola’s appointment as Municipal Manager “null and void”, effective immediately.


Two applications, one by the DA and the other by Western Cape Local Government MEC Anton Bredell, were brought last year in the Western Cape High Court to declare Sebola’s appointment unlawful.

Read more on sisters' publication, Knysna-Plett Herald

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
